name: Crayfish Tail Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the vinaigrette by mixing 1 part vinegar with 4 parts hazelnut oil, mustard, salt, and pepper to taste.
2. Boil the crayfish tails until cooked through and allow them to cool.
3. In a large bowl, combine spinach, endive, and blanched beans.
4. Add diced tomato, chopped shallots, chopped chervil, and tarragon to the bowl.
5. Add the cooled crayfish tails to the bowl.
6. Drizzle with vinaigrette, salt, and pepper.
7. Mix well and set aside.
